notes: SHIP v1.14.261 - U-MAP INSTRUMENT (Ship 1, per HANDOFF-INSPECT3D-STATE-LOCKUP S5 + RULING-UMAP-GLASS-BANDS). Rebuilds the rd rack-detail minimap (rack-hybrid-minimap / .scrubbar) into the cage-nut-compass instrument language: ZERO chrome behind it, engraved U-scale, tinted-GLASS equipment bands (fill ~20% + solid ~85% rim carrying identity + top-light/seat insets, NO glow/bloom - retires the purple-blob failure), a frosted 32px carriage with an engaged-band detent, and an Orbitron DRO U-readout. Canon palette approved: switch #8a4bff / gpu(compute) #1fffd0 / storage #ffcb45 / cooling #0abfd8 / server(patch) #5d7488; RULING S4 network->#3b82f6 azure (distinct from switch violet, validated by screenshot). Detent tracks the CARRIAGE (scroll centre), not selection (DETENT S3); tap-to-select folds into the later mirror/void view redesign. All body.rd-scoped, base .scrubbar rules untouched -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Nine edits, dct-ios.html only (CSS instrument block + scrubbar_buildHtml DRO/radius + rackHybrid_initSync engageAt/DRO wiring). Gates: node --check inline blocks PASS; CSS braces balanced; CRLF preserved; three-stamp .260->.261. NOT DEVICE-VERIFIED - screenshot self-verified only; John iPhone gate pending (RULING S5 + DETENT S7 checklist).
